text:
Assassin B was one of the assassins hired by the Ten Dons to eliminate the Phantom Troupe. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 95 

Appearance

Assassin B had crimson hair, which he had shaved on the left side to display a bird-like tattoo, while keeping the hair on the right side long and tied at the front to cover the right side of his face entirely. He had additional tattoos around his left eye and cheek, though it is unclear if he had similar tattoos around his other eye. He wore traditional clothes which was in stark contrast to his trendy hairstyle.

Personality

A man of few words, very little is known about Assassin B. According to Kurapika, he and Assassin A were the only two not intimidated by Silva and Zeno Zoldyck. He also agreed with Assassin A that they should all work by themselves, saying that they each have different styles and they can't force everyone to work together. 

In the 2011 anime adaptation, he also showed a side of confidence during his short clash with Chrollo. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 51 (2011) 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

When the assassins first meet up with the Mafia in Yorknew City to learn about their mission in detail, Kurapika recognizes that both Assassins B and A are the only ones who are not intimidated by the two Zoldycks and can hold their own. During the meeting, Assassin B agrees with Assassin A that they should work alone since they all have different styles. He is never seen again after the meeting, presumably killed some time after setting out to hunt his target, with Zeno telling the Mafia members that some of the assassins have already been killed. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 98 

Assassin B's fate is only depicted in the 2011 anime adaptation. In the middle of the chaos at the Cemetery Building, he finds Chrollo and challenges him. The two clash for an instant, with Assassin B emerging with a smirk on his face and believing that he has struck down the infamous thief. However, he collapses immediately after and reveals a fatal wound from a pen stabbed into the back of his head. Unscathed, Chrollo leaves the assassin's body behind. 

Equipment

In the 2011 anime adaptation, Assassin B seemed to prefer the use of traditional weaponry and wielded a pole-axe. Since he brought it with him to hunt the Troupe members, it is likely that he was proficient with it. 

Abilities & Powers

Assassin B was considered a powerful warrior who specialized in murder. He was one of two assassins hired by the Ten Dons who Kurapika said was not intimidated by the two Zoldycks and could hold his own. 

Nen

Since Kurapika grouped together Assassins A and B, and the former was capable of using Nen, it is likely that the latter was also a Nen user (although this was never shown).

Manga Appearances

Battles

Trivia

The character's name was never given in the manga or anime adaptations.

Anime and Manga Differences

Most of Assassin B's character details are added by the anime adaptation, given his short appearance in the manga.

In the 2011 anime adaptation, he was killed by Chrollo with only a pen and without even realizing he had been struck, believing that he had cut down his foe instead.
He was also depicted as a pole-axe user, likely proficient with it to a certain extent.
